Hardware Component File

N_H60B_TPMS_20160331

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_H60B_TPMS_20160331_20170127T130747.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 758
Receive ID 778
Functional Addr 08
Functional Name TPMS

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "2222",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]
